retrieved_note: Re-verified 2026-05-25 against the official Schedule of Charges Jan-Jun 2026 PDF (SOC-English-Jan-to-June-2026.pdf), the UBL Credit Card Summary Box (KFS-Change-in-SOC-Jan-2026-to-Jun-2026.pdf), the fee-reversal page, Signature - Priority Banking section of the SOC, and individual UBL product pages.

requirements.annual_fee_waiver_rule: Annual fee reversed if primary + supplementary combined retail spend reaches PKR 50,000 within 60 days of the statement on which the annual fee is levied; reversal request must be made within 120 days; FED on annual fee is not reversed.

notes: SOC Jan-Jun 2026 p.37 Section F (Credit Cards): Primary Card Annual Fee Visa Classic PKR 6,000; Supplementary Card Fee Visa Classic PKR 3,000.
KFS Summary Box (Jan-Jun 2026) confirms Classic credit limit band of PKR 25,000 to PKR 124,999 - this is a card credit-limit range, not a customer-side eligibility threshold.

UBL does NOT publish a public minimum-monthly-salary or minimum-account-balance criterion for the Classic credit card on the product page, the fee-reversal page, the SOC, or the KFS. Salary and balance therefore remain null (silence is not zero).
CNIC is required as a SBP KYC baseline for any consumer-credit product in Pakistan, but no separate income proof is published; the bank evaluates via internal underwriting.
Mukammal Current Account's PKR 25,000 YTD average is a fee-WAIVER trigger for the account, not a credit-card eligibility threshold - explicitly rejected as a candidate.

requirements.annual_fee_waiver_rule: Annual fee reversed if primary + supplementary combined retail spend reaches PKR 100,000 within 60 days of the statement on which the annual fee is levied; reversal request must be made within 120 days; FED on annual fee is not reversed.

notes: SOC Jan-Jun 2026 p.37 Section F: Primary Annual Fee Visa Gold PKR 12,000; Supplementary PKR 6,000. Verified vs prior pilot value (unchanged).
KFS Summary Box confirms Gold credit-limit band of PKR 125,000 to PKR 499,999 (credit line, not eligibility).
No publicly stated minimum-monthly-salary or minimum-account-balance criterion - left null.

requirements.annual_fee_waiver_rule: Annual fee reversed if primary + supplementary combined retail spend reaches PKR 300,000 within 60 days of the statement on which the annual fee is levied; reversal request must be made within 120 days; FED on annual fee is not reversed.

notes: SOC Jan-Jun 2026 p.37 Section F: Primary Annual Fee Visa Platinum PKR 20,000; Supplementary PKR 10,000. Verified - matches pilot.
KFS Summary Box confirms Platinum credit-limit band PKR 500,000 to PKR 7,000,000 (credit line, not eligibility).

Audit flag: no public salary/balance threshold. The supplementary cardholder section on the product page states 'Anyone with minimum age of 14 years can be your supplementary cardholder with no maximum age limit' - this is the only age threshold UBL publishes and applies only to supplementary cards, not to the primary applicant.
SOC also lists a Visa Signature (SBL legacy) credit card at PKR 30,000 annual / PKR 15,000 supplementary that is not in the current pilot card list - flagged in bank_gaps.

requirements.annual_fee_waiver_rule: Issuance/annual fee waived for UBL Mukammal, Urooj, Freelancer, Good Citizen, Pensioner, Business Partner Plus, and Zindagi accountholders maintaining the relevant YTD/monthly-average-balance trigger (commonly PKR 25,000); first debit card issuance is free across these accounts. See SOC waiver grids p.5-8.

notes: Corrected annual fee from PKR 2,800 -> PKR 2,900 per SOC Jan-Jun 2026 p.33 ('UBL Debit Card Fees' table, Premium Category): PKR 2,900 issuance, PKR 2,900 annual, PKR 1,800 replacement, PKR 1,500 supplementary.
Inherits from linked Conventional Current/Savings account; the Mukammal/Urooj/Freelancer/Good Citizen accounts publish no minimum-balance floor, hence 0.
Salary changed from 0 -> null: UBL does not publish a salary requirement for the debit card; silence is not zero.

requirements.annual_fee_waiver_rule: First debit card issuance is free for Mukammal/Urooj/Freelancer/Good Citizen/Pensioner/Business Partner Plus accountholders; ongoing annual waiver requires meeting the relevant account YTD-average trigger (PKR 25,000 on most accounts).

notes: Verified vs SOC Jan-Jun 2026 p.33 ('UBL Debit Card Fees' table, Classic Category): PKR 2,000 issuance, PKR 2,000 annual, PKR 1,800 replacement, PKR 1,200 supplementary. Unchanged.
Salary changed from 0 -> null: no salary threshold is published.
Linked-account inheritance: all standard UBL current/savings accounts can issue this card.

requirements.annual_fee_waiver_rule: Issuance, annual, supplementary, and replacement fees are waived as long as the customer maintains UBL Signature - Priority Banking criteria (PKR 3 million quarterly average balance in any LCY current account, or equivalent in FCY/deposits). On downgrade, the rack fees in the SOC apply.

notes: Critical correction: annual_fee_pkr changed from 0 -> 45,000. SOC Jan-Jun 2026 p.33 'UBL Debit Card Fees' table, Priority Banking Category: UBL VISA Infinite Debit Card Issuance/Annual PKR 45,000, Replacement PKR 1,800, Supplementary PKR 45,000. The card is FREE only on maintaining Signature - Priority Banking criteria, per SOC p.11 Section 8(a).

Eligibility threshold confirmed at SOC p.11 Section A ('UBL Signature - Priority Banking'): 'Any Local Currency Current Account: PKR 3 Million Quarterly' or equivalent FCY at PKR 6M, or 100% Current + 50% FCY deposits combined to PKR 3M. minimum_average_balance_pkr field added to capture the relationship-balance framing.
Note in SOC: 'Fee waivers shall not continue to apply for Signature Priority Banking customers who are affected by a downgrade.'

requirements.annual_fee_waiver_rule: Issuance, annual, supplementary, and replacement fees waived on maintaining UBL Signature - Priority Banking criteria (PKR 3 million quarterly average balance in any LCY current account, or equivalent in FCY/deposits). Rack fees apply on downgrade.

notes: Critical correction: annual_fee_pkr changed from 0 -> 25,000 and supplementary_annual_fee_pkr changed from 0 -> 25,000. SOC Jan-Jun 2026 p.33 'UBL Debit Card Fees' table, Priority Banking Category: UBL Signature Master Debit Card Issuance/Annual PKR 25,000, Replacement PKR 1,800, Supplementary PKR 25,000.
Free-on-product-page wording is reconciled in SOC p.11 Section 8(b): 'Signature Debit Master Card - Basic, Supplementary & Replacement: Free on maintaining Signature Priority Banking Criteria.'
Signature Priority Banking criteria (SOC p.11 Section A): PKR 3M quarterly average in any LCY current account, or PKR 6M equivalent FCY, or combined.

requirements.annual_fee_waiver_rule: First debit card issuance free for Ameen Mukammal/Urooj/Freelancer/Good Citizen accountholders; ongoing fee waiver requires meeting the relevant account YTD/monthly-average trigger.

notes: Corrected annual fee from PKR 2,800 -> PKR 2,900 per SOC Jan-Jun 2026 p.72 'UBL Ameen Debit Card Fees' table, Premium Category: UBL Ameen Premium Mastercard Issuance/Annual PKR 2,900, Replacement PKR 1,800, Supplementary PKR 1,500.
Salary changed from 0 -> null (no salary threshold published).
Linked Ameen current accounts publish no minimum-balance floor.

requirements.annual_fee_waiver_rule: No annual fee on the virtual prepaid card; one-time issuance fee PKR 300 plus FED is the only card-level charge.

notes: Verified: Fee Structure page lists PKR 300 + FED issuance fee, no annual fee.

SOC Jan-Jun 2026 p.33 (Classic Category) shows 'UBL Mastercard WIZ Virtual Debit Card' at PKR 600 issuance only (different SKU - the physical/dedicated WIZ Mastercard). The Wiz Virtual Prepaid product (the one in this pilot) is the dedicated-card-account variant priced at PKR 300 + FED.
PKR 100,000 max load/balance at a time; dedicated card-account has no minimum-balance penalty per FAQ.
Verified vs SOC Jan-Jun 2026 p.33 ('UBL Debit Card Fees' table, Classic Category): UBL UnionPay Debit Card Issuance/Annual PKR 2,300, Replacement PKR 1,800, Supplementary PKR 1,500. Unchanged.
FAQ states all new and existing UBL account holders can apply - account-linked, no separate balance/salary floor.
Salary changed from 0 -> null.

requirements.annual_fee_waiver_rule: Issuance/annual debit-card fee is free for UBL Urooj Current Account holders maintaining the published monthly-average tier waivers (PKR 500k tier per SOC p.5); first card issuance is free regardless of balance.

notes: Corrected annual fee from PKR 2,800 -> PKR 2,900 per SOC Jan-Jun 2026 p.33 (Premium Category): UBL VISA Urooj Debit Card Issuance/Annual PKR 2,900, Replacement PKR 1,800, Supplementary PKR 1,500.
Urooj Current Account has no minimum-balance floor (SOC p.5 Waiver Grid: minimum balance charges 'Free' at any tier).
Eligibility positioned as 'for women', but SOC does not publish a separate income or balance threshold on the card itself.
Salary changed from 0 -> null.

requirements.annual_fee_waiver_rule: First debit card issuance free for UBL Freelancer Account holders; full ongoing waiver requires PKR 500,000 monthly average balance per SOC p.6 Freelancer Waiver Grid.

notes: Corrected annual fee from PKR 2,800 -> PKR 2,900 per SOC Jan-Jun 2026 p.33 (Premium Category): UBL VISA Freelancer Debit Card Issuance/Annual PKR 2,900, Replacement PKR 1,800, Supplementary PKR 1,500.
Linked Freelancer Account itself has no minimum-balance floor (SOC p.6 shows only tier-based waiver grid, not a floor).
Salary changed from 0 -> null.

cards.card_name: UBL Visa FCY Business Debit Card

requirements.annual_fee_pkr_note: Fee published in FCY only: USD 15 / GBP 12 / EUR 14 / AED 56 / SAR 57 per annum (matching issuance fee). Supplementary not published. Replacement USD 10 / GBP 10 / EUR 10 / AED 35 / SAR 35.

notes: Verified at SOC Jan-Jun 2026 p.33 'FCY Business Category' row: USD 15 / GBP 12 / EUR 14 / AED 56 / SAR 57 for both issuance and annual; USD 10 / GBP 10 / EUR 10 / AED 35 / SAR 35 replacement. UBL does not publish a PKR-equivalent annual fee on this card. annual_fee_pkr remains null - this is a deliberate null because the bank prices the card in foreign currency by account currency.

Linked account: UBL ESFC (Exporters Special FC) Account. No minimum-balance threshold for the card itself is published on the card page or SOC; the account-side criteria are governed by SBP exchange-control rules rather than a UBL retail minimum-balance figure - left null.
International transaction charges are waived on POS and e-commerce channels for this FCY Business card (SOC p.33 note).

requirements.annual_fee_waiver_rule: Issuance/annual fee waived for Mukammal, Urooj, Freelancer, Good Citizen, Pensioner, Business Partner Plus, and Zindagi accountholders on meeting the relevant YTD-average trigger; first issuance free across these accounts.

notes: Corrected annual fee from PKR 2,800 -> PKR 2,900 per SOC Jan-Jun 2026 p.33 (Premium Category): UBL Mastercard Premium Debit Card Issuance/Annual PKR 2,900, Replacement PKR 1,800, Supplementary PKR 1,500.
FAQ states all new and existing account holders can apply - no separate salary/balance threshold.
Salary changed from 0 -> null.

gaps: UBL does NOT publish a public minimum-monthly-salary or minimum-account-balance threshold on any of its three primary credit cards (Classic / Gold / Platinum) - all are evaluated via internal underwriting. Salary and balance therefore remain null across the credit-card tier.

SOC Jan-Jun 2026 p.37 lists a 'Visa Signature (SBL)' credit card at PKR 30,000 primary annual / PKR 15,000 supplementary, plus four Mastercard (SBL) credit-card tiers (Standard / Gold / Titanium / Platinum) at PKR 3,500 / 8,000 / 14,000 / 18,000 - these are former Silkbank portfolio products not currently captured in the pilot's 14-card list.
UBL Visa Premium Plus Debit Card (Gold Category, PKR 3,500 / 3,500 / 1,800 / 2,400 per SOC p.33) is published in the SOC but is not in the current pilot.
UBL Visa FCY Business Debit Card fees are published only in FCY (USD/GBP/EUR/AED/SAR); annual_fee_pkr remains null because UBL does not publish a PKR equivalent.

All four Ameen variants (Infinite/Premium Plus/Premium/Urooj/Freelancer/PayPak) appear in the Ameen SOC table (p.72) at the same fee structure as the conventional cards; only the Ameen Premium Mastercard is captured in the pilot.
